name: navigate-dach-bureaucracy
description: Step-by-step guidance for DACH-specific governmental procedures including Anmeldung, Finanzamt registration, health insurance enrollment, and social security coordination. Use after arriving in a DACH country and needing to complete mandatory registrations, before a specific appointment to understand what to expect, when an initial registration attempt was rejected, when transitioning between DACH countries, or when handling registrations for dependents alongside your own.
